heading: Requests for decisions of the Comptroller General
label: 3529 Requests for decisions of the Comptroller General
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)352931:44(1st sentence).(1st par. 1st sentence), .June 10, 1921, ch. 18, § 30442 Stat. 2431:74(last par. words before 4th comma).(6th par. words before 4th comma), .July 31, 1894, ch. 174, § 828 Stat. 20831:82d(words after semicolon)., §§ 3(words after semicolon), 4(related to § 3 ), .Dec. 29, 1941, ch. 64155 Stat. 87631:82e(related to 31:82d).In subsection (a), before clause (1), the text of 31:82e(related to 82d) is omitted as unnecessary because it does not apply to 31:82d. The words “of law” in 31:82d(words after semicolon) are omitted as surplus. In clause (1), the words “or under them” in 31:74(last par. words before 4th comma) are omitted as unnecessary. In clause (2), the words “a payment on” in 31:82d(words after semicolon) are omitted as surplus.In subsection (b), the word “issue” is substituted for “render” in 31:74(last par. words before 4th comma) and “obtain” in 31:82d(words after semicolon) because of the restatement.

Amendments1996—Subsec. (b). designated existing provisions as par. (1) and substituted “Except as provided in paragraph (2), the Comptroller General” for “The Comptroller General”, and added par. (2).Pub. L. 104–316

children.text: a payment the disbursing official or head of the agency will make; or
a voucher presented to a certifying official for certification.
Except as provided in paragraph (2), the Comptroller General shall issue a decision requested under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: by the Director of the Office of Management and Budget, except as provided in subparagraph (B); or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of a function delegated by the Director to another agency, by the head of the agency to which the function was delegated.
